meaning: n.继承者,接任者,后续的事物
examples: Mr. Olsen has always avoided anointing any successor.
He had bowed out gracefully when his successor had been appointed.
President Hoover's successor attached even more importance to this problem.
His successor, Yasuo Fukuda, has pledged to continue along the path of reform while addressing inequality.
Nintendo is developing a successor to the GameCube, dubbed Revolution, for a likely late-2006 launch.
